svg.title: ESP32 C3 Super Mini Wireless Air Mouse Circuit Diagram
svg.desc: Circuit diagram showing ESP32 C3 Super Mini connected to MPU6050, lithium ion cell with TP4056 charging module, 5V boost converter, and four push buttons on pins 1,2,3,4
svg.text: Note: Add 10kΩ pull-up resistors on SDA & SCL lines. Buttons wired as active-LOW (GPIO → Button → GND, use INPUT_PULLUP in code).
